positive: A whimsical, minimalist illustration of a floating geometric cityscape at sunset, viewed from a central perspective. The scene features interconnected spheres, stylized natural elements like crescent moons and stylized palm leaves, and clean, bold lines against a vibrant gradient background transitioning from deep indigo to warm gold. The style is modern abstract art meets mid-century modern design, emphasizing crisp silhouettes and high contrast. Use a limited, cheerful color palette (teal, ochre, magenta). Ideal composition for repeating, centered apparel print.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, low detail, artifacts, noise, signature, watermark, text, logo, poor anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts
